queries.question: Show all awards where Gerardo Prat was on the awarding committee along with the festivals in which Gerardo Prat also participated.
queries.sql:
SELECT Festival.name 
FROM Festival
WHERE (Festival.event = "Film Festival" OR Festival.event = "Award") AND Festival.committee_members = "Gerardo Prat"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?festival a :Festival .
  ?festival p:name ?name .
  ?festival p:event ?event_w .
  ?festival p:event ?event_w2 .
  ?festival p:committee_members ?committee_members_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?event_w) = "Film Festival" || STR(?event_w2) = "Award")) && STR(?committee_members_w) = "Gerardo Prat"))
}

queries.question: Show all awards and festivals where Gerardo Prat was on the committee.
queries.sql:
SELECT Festival.name 
FROM Festival
WHERE Festival.event = "Film Festival" OR Festival.event = "Award" AND Festival.committee_members = "Gerardo Prat"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?festival a :Festival .
  ?festival p:name ?name .
  ?festival p:event ?event_w .
  ?festival p:event ?event_w2 .
  ?festival p:committee_members ?committee_members_w .
  FILTER((STR(?event_w) = "Film Festival" || (STR(?event_w2) = "Award" && STR(?committee_members_w) = "Gerardo Prat")))
}
